text: polos vesilevanos vetimotios el-qehilat hatesaloniqim belohim haav uvaadon yeshu'a hamashicha chesed lakhem veshalom meet elohim avinu vaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
node lelohim 'al-kulekhem bekhal-'et behazekirenu etekhem bitefiloteynu
bezakherenu tamid lifeney haelohim avinu et-po'al emunatekhem vigi'at ahavatekhem vesavelanut tiqevatekhem laadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
ki yada'enu achay chavivey haelohim et asher nivecharetem
baasher besoratenu lo vaa lakhem bedibur levad ki-gam bigevura uverucha haqodesh uveda'at nekhona meod kaasher yeda'etem et asher-hayinu betokhakhem lema'anekhem
viheyitem leholekhey ve'iqevoteynu uve'iqevot adoneynu ki qibaletem et-hadavar betokh 'oni rav bechedevat rucha haqodesh
'ad-heyotekhem lemofet lekhal-hamaaminim asher bemaqedoneya uvaakhaya
ki meitekhem nishema' qol devar yeho lo bemaqedoneya vaakhaya levad ki bekhal-maqom yatsea emunatekhem lelohim veeyn-lanu tsorekh ledaber 'od davar
ki-fihem hamagid meh-haya mevoenu aleykhem veeykh 'azavetem haelilim veshavetem lelohim la'avod el chay vaamiti
ulechakot liveno min-hashamayim asher he'iro min-hametim leyeshu'a hamatsilenu min-hecharon haba
ki atem achay yeda'etem et-mevoenu aleykhem ki lo-haya lariq
veacharey asher 'uneynu ulecherepa hayinu befilipi kaasher yeda'etem hitechazaqenu veloheynu lehagid gam-lakhem et-habesora benafetulim rabim
ki tokhachetenu eynena mitokh ta'ut velo mitokh tumea velo biremiya
ki kaasher nimetsenu neemanim lelohim lehafeqid beyadenu habesora ken nedaber velo liheyot retsuyim liveney adam ki im-lelohim habochen libotenu
ki me'olam lo dibarenu bisefat chalaqot kaasher yeda'etem velo lema'an betso'a betsa' basater 'ed haelohim
gam lo-viqashenu min-haadam kavod lo mikem velo meacherim af ki yakholenu liheyot biqar kishelichey hamashicha
ela halakhenu leat betokhakhem keomenet mefaneqet et-baneyha
uvechabevenu etekhem kakha chafatsenu latet lakhem lo et-besorat haelohim levad ela af nafeshoteynu ya'an ki-heyitem chavivim 'aleynu
halo tizekeru achay et-'amalenu veet-telaatenu asher yaga'enu layela veyomam levileti heyot lemasa leish mikem bevaserenu veqirebekhem et-besorat haelohim
'edim atem ve'ed haelohim im-lo viqedusha uvetsedeq uvetamim hayinu 'imakhem hamaaminim
veatem yeda'etem ki-kheav et-banayv hizeharenu et-kal-echad mikem vedibarenu 'al libo
vana'ad bakhem lalekhet katov lifeney haelohim haqore etekhem lemalekhuto velikhevodo

ba'avur zot anachenu lo nechedal lehodot lelohim ki atem qibaletem meitanu devar shemu'at haelohim velo-qibaletem oto kidevar beney-adam ki im-kemo-shehu veemet kidevar haelohim asher gam-po'el bakhem hamaaminim
ki-atem achay halakhetem be'iqevey qehilot haelohim asher-beerets yehuda bamashicha yeshu'a ki gam-atem 'uneytem 'al-yedey veney-'amekhem kaasher 'unu gam-hem 'al-yedey hayehudim
asher af-haregu et-haadon yeshu'a veet-nevieyhem veotanu radafu veeynam tovim be'eyney elohim umiteqomamim lekhal-adam
ha'otserim otanu midaber el-hagoyim sheyivashe'u lema'an asher-yemaleu et-chatoteyhem bekhal-'et vatasigem hachema 'ad-kale
vaanachenu achay acharey asher-shakholenu etekhem lizeman me'at lefanim velo lalev chashenu 'ad-meod lireot peneykhem biteshuqa raba
ve'al-ken chafatsenu lavo aleykhem ani folos pa'am ushetayim vehasatan 'atsaranu
ki mi tiqevatenu umi simechatenu va'ateret tifearetenu halo gam-atem lifeney adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha bevoo
amenam atem kevodenu vesimechatenu
ve'al-ken lo yakholenu 'od lehiteapeq vaniva'ats lehivater levadenu beatuna
vanishelach et-timotios achinu umesharet haelohim ve'ozerenu bivesorat hamashicha lechazeq etekhem ulehazehir 'al-devar emunatekhem
lema'an asher lo-yimot ish bametsuqot haele ki-yeda'etem af-atem ki lazot yu'adenu
halo kevar amarenu aleykhem biheyotenu etselekhem ki-'atidim anachenu lehilachets kaasher gam-haya vekhaasher yeda'etem
uva'avur ken lo-yakholeti 'od lehiteapeq vaeshelach lada'at emunatekhem ki amareti pen-nisa etekhem hamenase vehayeta lariq yegi'atenu

ve'ata keshuv eleynu timotios meitekhem vayevaser otanu et-besorat emunatekhem veahavatekhem veet asher atem zokherim otanu letova bekhal-'et venikhesafim lireot otanu kaasher nikhesof gam-anachenu lireotekhem
az nuchamenu 'aleykhem achay bekhal-tsaratenu velachatsenu 'al-yedey emunatekhem
ki 'ata nicheye im-ta'amedu atem baadoneynu
ki mah-nashiv lelohim lehodot lo ba'avurekhem 'al kal-hasimecha asher samachenu 'aleykhem lifeney eloheynu
layela veyomam mitepalelim anachenu berav-tachanunim lireot et-peneykhem ulehashelim et-machasorey emunatekhem
vehaelohim avinu vaadoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha hu yeyasher et-darekenu aleykhem
veetekhem yarebe haadon veyafere beahavat ish et-re'ehu uveahavat kal-adam kaasher anachenu ohavim etekhem
lechazeq et-levavekhem liheyot tamim biqedusha lifeney eloheynu avinu bevo yeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu 'im-kal-qedshayv

ve'od nevaqesha mikem achay venazehir etekhem baadoneynu yeshu'a ki kaasher qibaletem meitanu eykh 'aleykhem lehitehalekh velimetso chen be'eyney haelohim vekhaasher gam-hitehalakhetem ken tosifu vekhen tarebu 'od
ki yeda'etem et-hamitseot asher natanu lakhem beshem haadon yeshu'a
ki ze retson haelohim qedushatekhem lehiteracheq min-hazenut
veyeda' kal-ish mikem lehishetamesh bekhileyo biqedusha viqar
velo-vetaavat zima kederekh hagoyim asher-eynam yode'im haelohim
velo-ya'ashoq ish veyone et-achiv bemasa umatan ki-noqem yeho 'al-kal-zot kaasher kevar amarenu aleykhem veha'idonu vakhem
ki lo-qara otanu haelohim latumea ki im-laqedusha
'al-ken haboze lo ven-adam hu voze ki im-et-haelohim asher gam-sam beqirebenu et-rucha qadesho
ve'al-ahavat haachim eyn-tsorekh likhetov aleykhem halo af-atem lemudey yeho leahava ish et-re'ehu
vegam 'asitem ken lekhal-acheykhem asher bekhal-maqedoneya aval nevaqesha mikem achay asher ken ta'asu vekhen tosifu
vetishetadelu lashevet benachat veta'asu ish melakheto ba'amal yedeykhem kaasher tsivinu etekhem
lema'an titehalekhu khehogen 'im-otam shebachuts velo titsetarakhu leadam
ve'al-devar hayeshenim echay lo-nekhached mikem davar lema'an lo te'atsevu kaacherim asher eyn-lahem tiqeva
ki im-naamin asher-met yeshu'a vayechi ken yavi haelohim gam et-hayeshenim beyeshu'a ito
ki et-zot nomar lakhem bidevar yeho ki anachenu hachayim hanotarim 'ad-bo haadon loo neqadem et-hayeshenim
ki haadon hu yered min-hashamayim biteru'a beqol sar hamaleakhim uveshofar elohim veaz yaqumu rishona hametim bamashicha
acharey-khen anachenu hachayim hanotarim nilaqach itam yachedav ba'ananim liqerat haadon laavir uvekhen niheye tamid 'im-haadon
lakhen nachamu ze et-ze badevarim haele
ve'al-devar ha'itim vehazemanim eyn-tsorekh likhetov aleykhem echay
halo af-atem yeda'etem heytev ki yom-yeho kaganav balayela ken yavo
ki veameram shalom veshaleva yavo 'aleyhem hashever piteom kecheveley yoleda velo yukhelu himalet
aval atem achay lo bachshekh atem sheyasig etekhem hayom kaganav
atem kulekhem beney haor uveney hayom lo veney-halayela anachenu velo beney hachshekh
lakhen al-na neradem kemo haacherim ki im-nisheqod veniheye mefukachim
ki haniredamim niredamim balayela vehamishetakerim mishetakerim balayela
vaanachenu beney hayom nitepakecha-na venilebash et-shireyon haemuna vehaahava vekhakova' et-tiqevat hayeshu'a
ya'an asher lo-ye'adanu haelohim lecharon ki lareshet et-hayeshu'a 'al-yedey adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
asher met ba'adenu lema'an nicheye 'imo yachad im-nisheqod veim-nishan
'al-ken nachamu ze et-ze uvenu ish et-achiv kaasher 'asitem
vehinenu mevaqeshim mikem achay lehakir et-ha'amelim bakhem veet hanitsavim 'aleykhem bidevar haadon umokhichim etekhem
vetinehagu-vam kavod gadol meod beahava lema'an pe'ulatam vihi shalom beyneykhem
vehinenu mazehirim etekhem echay hokhichu et-hame'aqeshim darekheyhem ametsu et-rakey halevav timekhu et-hachalashim vehaarikhu rucha el-kal-adam
ureu pen-yeshalem ish lere'ehu ra'a tachat ra'a ki im-ridefu bekhal-'et et-hatov hen leish ish mikem hen lekhal-adam
simechu bekhal-'et
hitepalelu kal-hayom
hodu 'al-hakol ki-ze retson elohim bamashicha yeshu'a aleykhem
et-harucha lo tekhabu
et-hanevuot lo timeasu
bachanu kal-davar uvatov echozu
hiterachaqu mikal-hadome lara'
velohey hashalom hu yeqadesh etekhem biqedusha shelema vekhal-ruchakhem venafeshekhem vegufekhem yishamer tamim bevo adoneynu yeshu'a hamashicha
neeman hu haqore etekhem asher gam-ya'ase
achay hitepalalu va'adenu
shaalu lishelom kal-haachim baneshiqa haqedsha
hineni mashebi'akhem baadon asher tiqare haigeret hazot beazeney kal-haachim haqedshim
chesed yeshu'a hamashicha adoneynu 'imakhem amen ﻿
